items.description: A modular, accelerator-ready machine learning framework built in Go that speaks float8/16/32/64. Designed with clean architecture, strong typing, and native concurrency for scalable, production-ready AI systems. Ideal for engineers who value simplicity, speed, and maintainability.

items.name: AURA
items.description: Interpretable, generalized machine-learning framework for cross-site classification of autism using resting-state fMRI data

items.name: mohd-musheer.github.io

items.name: ModelingToolkit.jl
items.description: An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations

items.name: Renewable-Energy-Grid-Optimization
items.description: Machine learning-based framework for forecasting energy demand and optimizing renewable energy distribution in smart grid systems.

items.name: brpc
items.description: brpc is an Industrial-grade RPC framework using C++ Language, which is often used in high performance system such as Search, Storage, Machine learning, Advertisement, Recommendation etc. "brpc" means "better RPC".

items.name: LiS-solvation-MLIP
items.description: Universal machine learning framework for lithium-sulfur battery electrolyte solvation dynamics with experimental validation via Raman and PFG-NMR spectroscopy

items.name: hsa-binding-pose-ml
items.description: Machine-learning framework for binding pose identification on human serum albumin using docking and MD-derived features

items.name: tvm
items.description: Open Machine Learning Compiler Framework

items.name: personal-finance-analytics
items.description: A data-driven personal finance analytics system that calculates income tax liability under the Indian tax framework, assesses financial health using key indicators, and predicts financial stress levels with explainable insights. Built as an educational decision-support tool using Python, FastAPI, and machine learning techniques.

items.name: machinelearning
items.description: ML.NET is an open source and cross-platform machine learning framework for .NET.

items.name: omnivinci
items.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

items.name: Anamoly-Detection
items.description: Developed an anomaly detection framework using machine learning (Isolation Forest, One-Class SVM,  Local Outlier Factor) to reduce false positives in cybersecurity.

items.name: Supervised_ML_Studio
items.description: This repository contains supervised machine learning end to end model deployment steps through UI using streamlit framework

items.name: RakshAI
items.description: A machine learning–based system for detecting deepfake and synthetic audio using signal processing and neural network techniques. This repository contains an AI-driven framework for deepfake audio detection, leveraging acoustic features and deep learning models to identify synthetic and manipulated speech.

items.name: Prism
items.description: An advanced threat detection framework that integrates signature-based matching with machine learning anomaly detection to identify zero-day vulnerabilities. It features a distributed ML pipeline utilizing secure aggregation for privacy-preserving intelligence sharing and custom-built parsers to normalize logs

items.name: LightGBM
items.description: A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.

items.name: software-cost-estimation-framework
items.description: Hybrid ensemble machine learning and deep learning framework for accurate and explainable software cost estimation.

items.name: CanineGenomicsResearch
items.description: An Integrated Network and Machine Learning Framework for Prioritizing Canine Disease Genes: A Comparative Mammalian Genomics Perspective

items.name: codestresser
items.description: CodeStresser is a ML-driven static analysis framework that scans source code in multiple programming languages to detect security vulnerabilities. It extracts per-vulnerability features and uses machine learning models to predict severity and confidence, generating a structured, developer-friendly security report.

items.name: tyr
items.description: A dependently-typed machine learning framework for Lean 4, providing compile-time tensor shape verification.

items.name: ml-framework-comparison
items.description: This project is my hands-on portfolio to deepen understanding of machine learning and deep learning pipelines.

items.name: intelligent-test-selection-ml
items.description: Machine Learning–based intelligent test selection framework for CI/CD pipelines. Uses commit history, test execution data, and ML models to predict and run only relevant tests to accelerate regression cycles.

items.name: AI-Driven-Enterprise-Sales-Gross-Profit-Forecasting-Engine-2026-
items.description: A Machine Learning framework using CatBoost to forecast branch × product level sales and margin outcomes. Includes scenario simulation, CFO-grade financial logic (Sales → GP% → GP → COGS), enterprise dataset modeling, and AI-driven strategic planning for retail and distribution networks.

items.name: flaky-test-prediction-ml
items.description: Machine learning framework for detecting flaky tests and improving CI/CD pipeline reliability.

items.name: ML_Algorithms_From_Scratch
items.description: A growing collection of fundamental Machine Learning algorithms implemented completely from scratch using Python and `numpy`. This repository serves as an educational resource to understand the inner workings of various ML models without relying on high-level frameworks like scikit-learn for the core logic.

items.name: PyCaretAgent
items.description: PyCaretAgent is an autonomous AI agent framework that extends PyCaret with advanced reasoning and tool-use capabilities using the Google Generative AI SDK (google-adk). It bridges the gap between natural language requirements and production-ready machine learning pipelines.

items.name: sktime
items.description: A unified framework for machine learning with time series

items.name: ModelsFromScratch
items.description: This is a set of simple machine learning model implementations to deepen my understanding of the mathematics and how frameworks would implement these.

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.name: Kaggle-ML-Portfolio
items.description: Collection of machine learning projects spanning healthcare prediction, business analytics, and NLP - built with Python, scikit-learn, and deep learning frameworks.

items.name: mobiml
items.description: Framework for machine learning from movement data

items.name: NeoMatrix
items.description: A rust powered machine learning framework for python

items.name: Probabilistic-bitcoin-with-ML-
items.description: A Python-based framework designed to quantify risk in Bitcoin trading using Probabilistic Machine Learning. Most ML models fail in crypto because they ignore oratorical uncertainty (the inherent randomness of the market). This repo provides tools to build models that don't just predict the next move

items.name: tradingsystem
items.description: Modular backtesting framework for algorithmic trading using Backtrader. Features a 4-phase state machine strategy, JPY pair P&L correction (ERIS logic), and professional reporting. Educational resource for learning systematic trading.

items.name: Edge-Continual-Learning-for-Machine-Signal-Monitoring
items.description: Edge-Cloud Continual Learning is a hybrid TinyML framework that allows embedded devices to detect unknown machine signals and trigger cloud-based retraining. By using Replay Memory and Exemplar Datasets, the system evolves to recognize new machine types over time without losing its ability to monitor previous ones.

items.name: David-ML-Scanner-V2
items.description: David-ML is a sophisticated machine learning framework designed for quantitative traders and financial analysts seeking to build, test, and deploy advanced trading strategies. Built entirely in Python, this project combines cutting-edge ML algorithms with comprehensive backtesting capabilities and real-time decision-making systems.

items.name: AP
items.description: Real-time adaptive infrastructure adjusts load balancing and auto-scaling via machine learning-driven decision-making, delivering intelligent distributed systems framework.

items.name: An-interpretable-spatial-machine-learning-modeling-framework
items.description: This repository contains the relevant code and information for constructing the interpretable spatial machine learning modeling framework.

items.name: anvil
items.description: Anvil is a high-performance machine learning framework written in Rust, designed from the ground up for speed, parallelism, and control.

items.name: SwarmTorch
items.description: A distributed machine learning framework designed for real-world edge deployments where devices are resource-constrained, connections are unreliable and trust cannot be assumed. Built in Rust from the ground up, it brings swarm intelligence and federated learning primitives to environments where PyTorch and TensorFlow cannot operate.

items.name: rasaia
items.description: 💬   Open source machine learning framework to automate text- and voice-based conversations: NLU, dialogue management, connect to Slack, Facebook, and more - Create chatbots and voice assistants

items.name: Physics-Guided-Machine-Learning-for-Accurate-GSM-Prediction-in-Single-Jersey-Knit-Fabric
items.description: Physics-guided machine learning framework for predicting fabric GSM in Single Jersey knit fabrics. Evaluates 22 regression models with feature engineering (tightness factor), hyperparameter tuning, and explainable AI (SHAP, LIME). Extra Trees achieved best performance with RMSE ≈ 4.1 and R² ≈ 0.95 for accurate textile manufacturing prediction.

items.name: AutoML-SHAP-Analysis-Notebooks
items.description: Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) framework featuring comprehensive model interpretability using SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations). This repository showcases the end-to-end process of automated feature engineering, hyperparameter optimization, and the use of game-theory-based explanations to visualize global and local feature importance.

items.name: GAN-Enhanced-Phishing-Detection
items.description: A phishing detection framework that utilizes machine learning, adversarial training, and multi-modal feature extraction. It analyzes various data sources, including URLs, HTML, metadata, and user behavior, while leveraging GAN-generated samples to protect against adversarial attacks.

items.name: AIX
items.description: A single header Torch like C++ machine learning framework with multiple device acceleration support.

items.name: LEMONsc
items.description: Framework for  mass estimation of massive objects in astrophysical collision-driven systems using machine learning models

items.name: Drift-Aware-XAI-Fairness-Governance-Framework-XFGF
items.description: A comprehensive machine learning governance framework (Master's Thesis) designed to monitor the intersection of data drift, Explainable AI (SHAP/LIME), and algorithmic fairness over time in financial risk models.

items.name: Predictive-Pulse-BP-Analysis
items.description: An end-to-end machine learning framework for proactive blood pressure risk assessment. Featuring comprehensive data analysis, multi-algorithm comparison, and a Flask-based web application for real-time predictions.

items.name: days-since-last-ml-framework
items.description: Keep track of the newest machine learning frameworks on GitHub

items.name: SEAF
items.description: SEA Framework is a machine learning–based cybersecurity system designed to detect phishing and social engineering attacks. It uses a Gradient Boosting model for threat detection, TTP mapping for attacker behavior analysis, and geolocation-based visualization to help users understand and prevent malicious activities.

items.name: Multitask-learning
items.description: A joint modeling framework of Multi-Task Learning (MTL) and machine learning for limited sample data is proposed. This method integrates a hybrid neural network model that combines a Multilayer Perceptron and Convolutional Neural Network. It incorporates a cross-stitch structure, MTL, and homoscedastic uncertainty loss weighting mechanism.

items.name: FusedSCEquiTensorPot
items.description: A Multi-Operator Equivariant Framework for High-Performance Machine Learning Force Fields, supporting External Fields embedding and Physical Tensors prediction.

items.name: Aegis
items.description: Aegis is a decentralized machine learning framework designed to predict heart disease risk without compromising patient privacy.

items.name: QuantTradeAI
items.description: A comprehensive machine learning framework for quantitative trading strategies

items.name: Predictive_pulse
items.description: An end-to-end machine learning framework for proactive blood pressure risk assessment. Featuring comprehensive data analysis, multi-algorithm comparison, and a Flask-based web application for real-time predictions.

items.name: quantum-neural-architecture
items.description: An experiment to work with quantum machine learning framework with Variational Quantum Circuits(VQC) as a tunable circuit.

The project focuses on implementing core ML algorithms manually and gradually evolving into a high-performance research-grade engine with optional R integration.

items.name: PmLSN
items.description: My first Machine Learning model. PsLSM, which stands for Prediction Model For Large Sequence Of Numbers takes in 5 numbers and predicts which type of sequence it is and its common difference/ratio if it is AP/GP. Made with PyTorch framework

Focused on 2026 industry standards, this collection bridges the gap between fundamental revision and experimental AI development.

items.description: Machine Learning framework in C++ from scratch. For learning.

It includes RADAR, SOURIS, and CORALIE modules for reaction-level, cross-cohort, and multi-tier correlation analyses.
